title: PartnerAccessExternalWebhookRep
description: Information about a Toast platform restaurant.

restaurantGuid.description: The unique Toast platform identifier for the restaurant.

managementGroupGuid.description:
The unique Toast platform identifier for the management group
containing the restaurant.

restaurantName.description: The human-readable name of the restaurant location.

locationName.description:
The identifier of a specific restaurant location, set on the
*Restaurant Info* page of Toast Web.
For example, a restaurant group might assign a location code
such as `Location1234` to a specific location.

externalGroupRef.description:
An identifier for the restaurant group that is recognized by your
integrated partner service. This information is entered by the
restaurant administrator. If you need information about the restaurant
group in this data string, you instruct the restaurant administrator
to enter it in the Toast platform configuration for the integration
partner connection.

externalRestaurantRef.description:
An identifier for the restaurant location that is recognized by your
integrated partner service. This information is entered by the
restaurant administrator. If you need information about the restaurant
location in this data string, you instruct the restaurant
administrator to enter it in the Toast platform configuration for the
integration partner connection.

modifiedDate.description:
The most recent date and time that the partner connection
was edited in epoch time (milliseconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00).

createdDate.description: The date and time that the partner connection was created in epoch time (milliseconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00).

isoModifiedDate.description:
The most recent date and time that the partner connection
was edited in ISO8601 format.

isoCreatedDate.description: The date and time that the partner connection was created in ISO8601 format.

createdByFirstName.description: The first name of the restaurant employee who initiated the event.

createdByLastName.description: The last name of the restaurant employee who initiated the event.

createdByEmailAddress.description:
The email address of the restaurant employee who connected the
restaurant to your integrated partner service, or who edited the
connection details.

createdByPhoneNumber.description: The phone number of the user who initiated the event.

restaurantPhoneNumber.description: The phone number of the restaurant.

restaurantAddressLine1.description: The physical address of the restaurant location.

restaurantAddressLine2.description: Optional additional physical address of the restaurant location.

restaurantCity.description: The city in which the restaurant is located.

restaurantState.description: The state in which the restaurant is located.

restaurantZipCode.description: The zip code of the restaurant location.

restaurantLatitude.description: The latitude of the restaurant location.

restaurantLongitude.description: The longitude of the restaurant location.

restaurantCountryCode.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the restaurant location.

restaurantTimezone.description:
The IANA time zone identifier of the restaurant location.
For example, `America/New_York`.
